creator: spe@internetway.net
text:
When I try to use Distributions/Custom OR Upgrade/Custom, /stand/sysinstall
crashes with sigsegv (signal 11)
I try to use options on 5 different PCs... and the problem is software.

Fix: 

correct the bug in /stand/sysinstall
How-To-Repeat: Use Upgrade/Custom on /stand/sysinstall with or without floppy disks
boot.
